examples: The epidermal cells are oblong, longitudinally extended.
The epidermal folds around their mouths collect molecules for olfactory analysis.
Telia are dark brown or black, and shine from the intact host epidermal covering.
The mutation freezes a crucial protein called epidermal growth factor receptor in the "on" position.
All three drugs target the epidermal growth factor receptor (EGFR), a protein that is over-expressed in cancer cells.
